title: The Psychology of Consumer Behavior
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.text: Marketers use various (0) psychological techniques to influence our choices. One common strategy is the (17) of a product through celebrity endorsements. This creates an (18) association between the brand and success. || Another tactic involves creating a sense of (19), making shoppers feel they must act (20). Many consumers are (21) of these subtle manipulations. However, (22) in financial literacy can help people make more (23) decisions. Ultimately, understanding our own (24) is the best defense against impulse buying.

questions.explanation: Noun meaning the representation of an abstract quality in human form.
